message:
test(proptest): add 34 property tests for ux_scenario_validation module (ft-3681t.9.1)

Covers serde roundtrips (5), workflow class/friction category labels (2),
PhaseResult constructor invariants (2), ScenarioEvaluator phase acceptance (3),
ScenarioExecution counter arithmetic (3), ScenarioEvaluator verdict logic (3),
GoNoGoEvaluation gate logic (2), UxTelemetry aggregation (2), ScenarioSpec
phase counting (1), plus 5 standard factory unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
